description_long: This is a tall, rectangular cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring a matte dark finish. The front side displays two vertical recessed lines, likely indicating the presence of double doors, and a horizontal groove near the bottom, suggesting a pull-out drawer. The other sides are plain and unadorned, emphasizing its modern, utilitarian style. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from wood or engineered wood, possibly with a laminate or painted surface. Its solid build and lack of visible legs suggest it is designed to stand directly on the floor. The object is suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces for storage purposes.
description: A tall, matte dark cabinet with double doors and a lower drawer, featuring a minimalist, modern design. The front has recessed lines and grooves, while the other sides are plain.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain, flat surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: Rear view, also plain and featureless, matching the side panels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to the first side, with a smooth, unbroken surface.
description_view_3: Front view displaying two vertical recessed lines (doors) and a horizontal groove (drawer) at the bottom.
